item.title: sloggi Women s sloggi Body Adapt Twist T-Shirt Bra Bra Molded Black M
item.description: Está sloggi Women s sloggi Body Adapt Twist T-Shirt Bra Bra Molded Black M en el siguiente enlace! ℹ️: Con elastano Creora Fresh, que es flexible, transpirable, natural, aireado y fresco Con suave calidad Hyper-Micro-con tacto suave y sedoso y ligero efecto moldeador Small Sloggi print on one side 🛒 Ver la oferta!! Check the price of this item in other countries: 🇬🇧 United Kingdom | 🇺🇸 USA | 🇩🇪 Germany | 🇪🇸 Spain | 🇫🇷 France | 🇮🇹 Italia | 🇦🇪 Arab Emirates | 🇨🇦 Canada | 🇧🇪 Belgium | 🇳🇱 Neederlands | 🇵🇱 Poland | 🇸🇪 Sweden |
